name: Leydi Cash Jewelry
description_short: Leydi Cash Jewelry is a Miami-based jewelry retailer and pawn shop offering gold buying, jewelry sales, repairs, and 0% interest financing options.
description_long:
Leydi Cash Jewelry operates as a dual-purpose business combining retail jewelry sales with pawn shop services across two Miami locations in Kendall and Flagler. The company has established itself in the South Florida market by focusing on both new jewelry inventory and secondary market services for customers seeking cash for gold and other items. Their business model reflects a traditional pawn shop approach while emphasizing their retail jewelry brand and customer experience.

The company offers a comprehensive range of services including new jewelry sales (rings, necklaces, pendants, bangles, and earrings), jewelry repair, pawn services, gold buying, and 0% interest financing for purchases. Their inventory features Cuban, Italian, and other international jewelry styles, with prominent marketing of lab-grown diamonds and items at various price points from under $200 to several thousand dollars. They actively promote sales and discounts, including up to 35% off women's jewelry and 30% off lab-grown diamonds.

Leydi Cash differentiates itself through multi-language support (Spanish/English), convenient financing without interest charges, immediate cash payments for gold, and bundled services combining retail shopping with pawn functionality. Their marketing emphasizes jewelry expertise, quality guarantees, service flexibility, and accessibility through two physical locations with dedicated phone lines for each store. Customer testimonials highlight their gold buying practices, jewelry repair quality, and fair pricing.

The primary caveat is that pawn shops operate under regulatory constraints and require collateral for loans, limiting accessibility compared to unsecured credit products. While they market 0% interest financing, the terms and eligibility criteria are not specified on their website. Their service area appears limited to Miami-Dade County based on listed locations, and like all pawn operations, they generate revenue from interest on loans and markups on resold items.
address: 10920 W Flagler St STE 212, Miami, FL 33174

company_info.headquarters: 10920 W Flagler St STE 212, Miami, FL 33174

pros: Offers 0% interest financing on jewelry purchases, avoiding standard credit card interest rates
Provides immediate cash payments for gold and jewelry, with same-day service implied
Full-service jewelry repair offered in-house at both locations
Bilingual website and customer service (Spanish and English)
Curated inventory of international styles including exclusive Cuban and Italian jewelry pieces
Two physical locations with dedicated phone lines for customer convenience
Transparent pricing displayed on website with original and discounted prices clearly marked
cons: Pawn services require collateral, making them inaccessible for customers seeking unsecured credit
No terms, APR, or eligibility requirements disclosed for 0% financing offers on website
Limited geographic availability restricted to two Miami locations without evidence of expansion
Customer testimonials are generic and lack specific transaction details or third-party verification
Website lacks transparency on gold buying prices, appraisal methods, or pawn loan terms and conditions
best_for: Miami-area residents seeking to sell gold or jewelry for immediate cash
Jewelry shoppers looking for 0% interest financing on purchases over $500
Customers needing jewelry repair services with same-day or quick turnaround
Spanish-speaking consumers preferring bilingual retail and financial services
diagnosis: Leydi Cash Jewelry is best suited for Miami-area consumers with jewelry to sell for quick cash, or shoppers seeking 0% interest financing on jewelry purchases. The main caveat is that their pawn services require valuable collateral, and critical loan terms (APR on financed items, loan-to-value ratios, repayment periods) are not disclosed online, requiring in-store contact for specific details.
services: New jewelry retail sales (rings, necklaces, pendants, earrings, bangles)
Pawn loans against jewelry and other collateral
Gold and precious metal buying at stated fair prices
Buy-back or trade-in programs for existing jewelry
